div.h1: Bandwidth Comparison: Full State vs Delta Gossip
div.p: Per-round bytes sent demonstrates O(N × state_size) vs O(fanout × delta_size)

The lastSent watermark tracks the highest version transmitted. Only entries with version > lastSent are included in gossip messages. go entries := store.GetDelta(lastSent) // Only changed entries, not full state

g.text: Full State | N × state_size | 100 MB | 1 GB
Delta Gossip | fanout × delta_size | 3 KB | 3 KB

ul.li: Constant per node regardless of N
